title: Account Support Button Visibility Test
summary: Testing placement and styling of support button to improve discoverability and ticket submission rates.
hypothesis: By changing the support button placement from top navigation to a bottom-right purple widget, we expect to increase support ticket submission visibility and engagement, though user feedback suggests the current treatment may be reducing discoverability.
notes: Customer reported difficulty finding support button with new placement. This appears to be a currently running experiment that may need review based on user feedback.
control_description: Support button visible in top navigation of account page
treatment_description: Purple widget/box positioned in bottom right corner of account page
